name: avi-claude-forge
description: A Claude Code marketplace of plugins, skills, and agents for orchestrating Claude Code workflows.

plugins.name: telegram-tower
plugins.description: Spawn, list, resume, and kill Claude Code sessions with Remote Control enabled. Designed to be driven from a Telegram channel dispatcher.

plugins.name: principal-engineer-eval
plugins.description: Two radical-candor output styles for Claude Code (v1 terse rule-driven, v2 elaborated principal-engineer pairing voice), plus a skill and slash command to quantitatively evaluate output style behavior (sycophancy resistance, position-holding, hallucination rate, concision, critique quality, citation rate) before rolling out to a team.
